comment: √ñsterreichische Druckschrift: F has 3 strokes. Stroke 1: vertical top‚Üíbottom. Stroke 2: top crossbar left‚Üíright. Stroke 3: mid crossbar left‚Üíright. All strokes start from left or top.

strokes.comment: Top crossbar: left to right at cap height
